message:
fix(connectors): use Self:: in trait impls and exhaustive match in Gmail

- anthropic/error.rs: replace AnthropicError:: with Self:: in
  ConnectorErrorMapping trait impl methods (to_fcp_error, is_retryable,
  retry_after) for idiomatic Rust
- gmail/connector.rs: replace wildcard _ match arm with explicit
  GoogleMaterializedAuth::BearerToken { .. } in configure status
  resolution for exhaustive pattern matching

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
